description: Independent judge verdict over an authored seed task. Every category must report found=false for the seed to be accepted into the corpus.

scope_creep.description: The task or reference fix does more than the stated objective.

missed_requirements.description: The task prompt omits a requirement its tests actually enforce.

extra_requirements.description: The tests enforce behavior the prompt never asked for.

seed_code_bugs.description: The starting workspace code is broken in a way unrelated to the intended defect.

reference_fix_bugs.description: The reference fix patch is incorrect, incomplete, or does not apply cleanly.

weak_tests.description: The tests pass without a correct fix, or fail to discriminate the defect.

nondeterminism.description: Verification depends on time, network, ordering, or other nondeterministic state.

seed_reviews.description: Per-seed acceptance decisions when a batch authored multiple seeds.
